眼鏡.mnemonics: Sounds like 'May-gah-neh.' Picture someone in May going 'Neh' because they can't see without their glasses.

歌.mnemonics: Sounds like 'ooh-tah.' Imagine saying 'ooh' in wonder when you hear a beautiful song.

サークル.mnemonics: Sounds like 'circle.' Picture a group of people forming a circle for a club meeting.

車.mnemonics: Sounds like 'cool-ma.' Imagine a really cool mom driving a fancy car.

長い.mnemonics: Sounds like 'nag-eye.' Think of a long, nagging sigh.

短い.mnemonics: Sounds like 'me-gee-guy.' Imagine a short guy who always says 'Me? Gee, I'm short.'

速い.mnemonics: Sounds like 'high-yai.' Think of something moving so fast it goes high and yells 'Yai!'

背が高い.mnemonics: Sounds like 'sega-ta-kai.' Picture a tall person who loves playing Sega games.

背が低い.mnemonics: Sounds like 'sega-hikui.' Imagine a short person who feels low (hikui) when they can't reach the Sega console.

頭がいい.mnemonics: Sounds like 'atama guy E.' Picture a smart guy named E who always uses his head (atama).
